import React, { useState } from "react"; import { CheckCircle } from "lucide-react"; export default function CheckoutPage() { const [email, setEmail] = useState(""); const [phone, setPhone] = useState(""); const [username, setUsername] = useState(""); const orderSummary = [ { name: "Be Nice Shower Cream, Perfect Elastic Formula, 450 ml", category: "Shower", qty: 1, price: 105.0, img: "/images/shower1.png", }, { name: "Protex Shower Cream, Perfect Elastic Formula, 450 ml", category: "Shower", qty: 2, price: 210.0, img: "/images/shower2.png", }, ]; const subtotal = orderSummary.reduce((acc, item) => acc + item.price * item.qty, 0); return (
{/* Header */}
Login
Delivery
Payment
Checkout
{/* Main content */}
{/* Left side - Form */}
{/* 1. Login */}

1. Login

setEmail(e.target.value)} className="w-full p-2 border rounded" />
{/* 2. Delivery */}

2. Delivery

{/* Delivery Options */}

Delivery Options

*Estimated delivery times exclude bank holidays and weekends. Orders placed after 6pm Friday will be dispatched the following working day.

{/* Delivery Address */}

Delivery Address

setUsername(e.target.value)} className="w-full p-2 border rounded mb-3" />
setPhone(e.target.value)} className="flex-1 p-2 border rounded" />
{/* Billing Address */}

BILLING ADDRESS:

{/* Button */}
{/* Right side - Order Summary */}

Summary Order

{orderSummary.map((item, index) => (

{item.name}

{item.category}

Qty: {item.qty}

${item.price.toFixed(2)}

))}
SubTotal({orderSummary.length} Products) ${subtotal.toFixed(2)}
Delivery (Standard delivery) Free
Total (SubTotal + Delivery) ${subtotal.toFixed(2)}
); }
